parameters.name: ReposStateBadge
parameters.description: Live repo-state dashboard. Fetches /api/state.json (produced by build:state from state.db) and renders tag_values / events / tool_runs / faults_active. Highlights active faults with a red chip.
parameters.template:
tags {{ summary.tag_values }}events {{ summary.events }}tool runs {{ summary.tool_runs }} / {{ summary.tool_failures }} failpipelines {{ summary.pipeline_runs }} / {{ summary.pipeline_failures }} fail{{ summary.faults_active }} active faults
{{ #summary.last_event }}

last event: {{ summary.last_event.kind }} on {{ summary.last_event.tag }} {{ summary.last_event.from_state }} → {{ summary.last_event.to_state }} at {{ summary.last_event.at }}

{{ /summary.last_event }}
